description: Fixture builder pattern - legitimate when not replacing oracle, with meaningful assertion
code:
def test_fixture_builder_legit():
    # Fixture builder builds test data, not behavior under test
    # This is legitimate - fixture is NOT replacing the oracle
    test_data = build_test_fixture({'name': 'Alice', 'role': 'admin'})
    # Still has meaningful assertion against the system under test
    user = UserService().create(test_data)
    assert user.name == 'Alice'  # Meaningful assertion
    assert user.role == 'admin'
